behaviors.reasoning: Verifying evaluate writes to grounding artifact requires command layer + structured-data storage integration.
Implement behavior spans retrieval of grounding and independent write to plan in one integrated flow.
Ensuring deep-dive does not overwrite plan is an inter-skill artifact-ownership integration concern.
This requires a full multi-step AI agentic workflow where prior skill output changes later planning behavior across steps.
Fallback when grounding is absent is deterministic flow-control across storage and plan-generation modules.
